signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates and marking the highest level since January 2024, driven by a 7.2% energy price surge including 20% fuel and 44.4% heating oil increases.[2] This recent confirmation could shift prediction markets on ECB

signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Push | YES | HIGH confidence**[1
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Push | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]
